name: Tryst With Destiny
overview: A billionaire learns there is something money can't buy, a lower-caste couple attempts to build a new life, and a corrupt city cop finds himself far outside of the law in Nair's slyly biting triptych on class in contemporary India.

trailers.title: Tryst With Destiny | Official Trailer | SonyLIV Originals | Streaming on 5th November
